2023-24 California Golden Bears Men's Roster and Stats

Previous Season Next Season

Record: 13-19 (9-11, 6th in Pac-12 MBB)

Coach: Mark Madsen

PS/G: 74.0 (165th of 362)

PA/G: 77.0 (316th of 362)

SRS: 4.94 (106th of 362)

SOS: 8.00 (57th of 362)

ORtg: 103.7 (236th of 362)

DRtg: 108.0 (293rd of 362)

Preseason Odds: Championship +50000
